message.content:
Edit the file /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBSIL-image_list.adoc

In the outputs section, add a Repository header line before the locator lines. Change this section:

```
// ⟦axs_outputs⟧
. *Display Results*:
.. {rbbc_show}
one {rbst_locator} per line in `moniker:tag` format, sorted by {at_moniker} then tag
```

To:

```
// ⟦axs_outputs⟧
. *Display Results*:
.. {rbbc_show}
`Repository: «REGISTRY_HOST»/«REGISTRY_PATH»` as first line
.. {rbbc_show}
one {rbst_locator} per line in `moniker:tag` format, sorted by {at_moniker} then tag
```

Read the file first, then make the edit.

content.text: I'll read the file first, then make the edit.

content.content:
1→NOTE: This operation lists container images in
     2→{rbtgi_repository}
     3→using the Artifact Registry REST API for package enumeration and the Docker Registry HTTP API V2 for tag listing.
     4→
     5→NOTE: This is a low-level operation that displays raw {rbst_locator} values without
     6→{rbtga_ark}
     7→semantics.
     8→
     9→The
    10→{rbtr_director}
    11→lists all images:
    12→
    13→// ⟦axs_inputs⟧
    14→. *Validate Input Parameters*:
    15→.. {rbbc_require}
    16→no arguments provided
    17→
    18→// ⟦axs_behavior⟧
    19→. *Authenticate as
    20→{rbtr_director}*:
    21→.. Execute
    22→{rbtoe_director_authenticate}
    23→.. {rbbc_store}
    24→`«DIRECTOR_TOKEN»` for subsequent API calls
    25→
    26→. *Fetch Package List*:
    27→.. {rbbc_call}
    28→link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories.packages/list[Artifact Registry API: List Packages] with:
    29→... method: `GET`
    30→... endpoint: `https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1/projects/{rbrr_depot_project_id}/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}/repositories/{rbrr_gar_repository}/packages`
    31→... header: `Authorization: Bearer «DIRECTOR_TOKEN»`
    32→.. {rbbc_require}
    33→HTTP 200 response
    34→.. {rbbc_store}
    35→`«PACKAGES»` array from response JSON
    36→.. {rbbc_fatal}
    37→if request fails: "Failed to fetch package list"
    38→
    39→. *Fetch Tags per Package*:
    40→.. For each package in `«PACKAGES»`:
    41→... Extract {at_moniker} from package name (last path component)
    42→... {rbbc_call}
    43→link:https://github.com/opencontainers/distribution-spec/blob/main/spec.md#content-discovery[Docker Registry API: GET tags/list] with:
    44→.... method: `GET`
    45→.... endpoint: `«REGISTRY_BASE»/«MONIKER»/tags/list`
    46→.... header: `Authorization: Bearer «DIRECTOR_TOKEN»`
    47→... {rbbc_store}
    48→`«TAGS»` array from response JSON field `tags`
    49→
    50→// ⟦axs_outputs⟧
    51→. *Display Results*:
    52→.. {rbbc_show}
    53→one {rbst_locator} per line in `moniker:tag` format, sorted by {at_moniker} then tag
    54→
    55→// ⟦axs_completion⟧
    56→Procedure completes successfully when all {rbst_locator} values have been displayed.
    57→

<system-reminder>

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.content: The file /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBSIL-image_list.adoc has been updated successfully.

content.text:
Done. I've successfully edited the file `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBSIL-image_list.adoc` to add a Repository header line in the outputs section. The change adds:

- A new display line showing `Repository: «REGISTRY_HOST»/«REGISTRY_PATH»` as the first line of output
- A second `{rbbc_show}` annotation before the existing locator output description

The outputs section now displays the repository information first, followed by the individual image locators in `moniker:tag` format.
